extended_help:
Buy potions to continue grinding.

**Available items:**
🧪 Stamina Potion — 150 coins → +30 stamina
🍖 HP Potion — 100 coins → +50 HP

**How to use:**
1. /shop — open catalog with buttons
2. /shop item:... — buy directly

**Notes:**
- Effect applies instantly, not added to inventory
- Stamina/HP cannot exceed max
- Must /start first

Tips: buy HP Potion before /hunt, Stamina Potion for spamming /fish or /explore.
title: 🏪 Nova Shop
no_money: ❌ Not enough coins! Need **{{price}}**, you have **{{balance}}**.
